rationale: Gov't Code §2306.152 governs eligibility criteria for housing finance division programs. It does not reference or depend on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: The board shall have the specific duty and power to establish eligibility criteria for participation in the housing finance division's programs for individuals and families of low and very low income and families of moderate income.
_note: No textual or operational nexus between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
